pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to align with Java 11 support and modern dependency management.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 11 for compilation and runtime targeting.
Remove explicit maven.compiler.source/target properties as they are now managed by the Spring Boot parent or java.version property.
Update Spring Cloud version to a release compatible with Spring Boot 2.4 and Java 11.
Update Spring Cloud Starter version to match the new Spring Cloud release train.
Update Spring DevTools version to match the Spring Boot 2.4.x line.
Update Spring Starter Test version to match the Spring Boot 2.4.x line.
Update Netflix Eureka Client to version 3.0.0 which supports Java 11 and Spring Cloud 2020.
Update JAXB version to 3.0.0, removing the milestone suffix for a stable release compatible with Java 11.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI, which is the recommended OpenAPI 3.0 implementation for Spring Boot 2.4+.
Define the version property for the new SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency.
Update Liquibase to version 4.2.2 to ensure compatibility with Java 11 and newer Spring Boot versions.
Update Spring Kafka to version 2.6.5 to align with Spring Boot 2.4.x dependencies.
Add Apache Commons BeanUtils as a managed dependency for utility functions.
Add Ehcache as a managed dependency for caching support.
Add JCache API as a managed dependency to support standard caching interfaces.
Add Spring Boot Starter Web to dependency management to centralize version control.
Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor to dependency management for metadata generation.
Add Spring Boot Starter Cache to dependency management to centralize version control.
Add Bean Validation API to dependency management to centralize version control.
Configure distribution management to publish artifacts to GitHub Packages.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added distributionManagement block with GitHub URL

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit <name> element as it defaults to the artifactId.
Remove explicit source and reporting encoding properties as they are handled by the Spring Boot parent.
